A script to generate cscope files for source and test directories, excluding most freertos ports.

# Purpose
This script automates the generation of a `cscope` database for a codebase. It first removes any existing `cscope.out` file to ensure a fresh start. It then creates a list of source files by searching for `.c` and `.h` files in the current directory and the `../tests/` directory, excluding most FreeRTOS ports except the ones in use. The script appends these file paths to `cscope.files`. Finally, it builds the `cscope` database with the `-b`, `-R`, `-q`, and `-k` options, which enable batch mode, recursive directory search, fast symbol lookup, and kernel mode, respectively.
